 {"id":"bd-3so","title":"Logging spec: structured logs + correlation IDs for extensions","description":"Background:
- Capture/harness/runtime logs must be consistent, searchable, and safe.

Steps:
- Define a structured JSON log schema for extension execution (fields + types).
- Standardize correlation IDs (extension id, scenario id, tool/command/event id).
- Specify redaction rules for secrets/PII and normalization for tests.
- Document where logs are emitted and how to consume them in CI.

Acceptance:
- Extension-related logs across capture/harness/runtime follow the schema.
- Deterministic logs enable fixture diffs and triage.","acceptance_criteria":"[ ] Scope in description implemented fully with no feature loss
[ ] Unit tests cover core success/failure + edge cases for this bead (add regression coverage if applicable)
[ ] Integration/E2E script exercises the end-to-end path (or explicitly marks N/A with rationale in notes) and emits detailed JSONL logs + artifacts per bd-4u9
[ ] Logs include inputs, outputs, timing, and redaction summary; artifacts list is deterministic
[ ] Any new fixtures/golden outputs are deterministic and documented
[ ] Quality gates pass: cargo fmt --check, cargo check --all-targets, cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings, cargo test
[ ] Docs/fixtures updated if behavior or UX changes","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-03T02:47:40.485700214Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-04T19:26:23.968765693Z","closed_at":"2026-02-03T03:07:34.207512710Z","close_reason":"Structured log schema + correlation IDs documented; protocol + Rust types aligned","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-3t2h","title":"Conformance: subagent/ (multi-file tool+UI extension)","description":"Full conformance testing for the subagent extension — spawns sub-agent processes for delegated tasks. Multi-file with UI integration for progress display.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-05T06:17:47.719457798Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T01:32:54.730091711Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T01:32:54.729963522Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3t2h","depends_on_id":"bd-24xr","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-05T06:17:47.735532806Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

Add AGENTS guidance to set TMPDIR to a roomy tmpfs path alongside CARGO_TARGET_DIR.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-02-09T17:41:28.956034564Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-09T17:42:34.159805775Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}

Add AGENTS guidance to set TMPDIR to a roomy tmpfs path alongside CARGO_TARGET_DIR.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-02-09T17:41:28.956034564Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-09T17:52:48.844631075Z","closed_at":"2026-02-09T17:52:48.844604335Z","close_reason":"Duplicate/covered by bd-3v89 (commit 38d1696d)","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-3tu","title":"Crates publishing workflow for pi_agent_rust + libs","description":"Add crates.io publish workflows/metadata for pi_agent_rust, asupersync, rich_rust, charmed_rust; plan migration from path deps to versioned crates.","acceptance_criteria":"[ ] Scope in description implemented fully with no feature loss
[ ] Unit tests cover core success/failure + edge cases for this bead (add regression coverage if applicable)
[ ] Integration/E2E script exercises the end-to-end path (or explicitly marks N/A with rationale in notes) and emits detailed JSONL logs + artifacts per bd-4u9
[ ] Logs include inputs, outputs, timing, and redaction summary; artifacts list is deterministic
[ ] Any new fixtures/golden outputs are deterministic and documented
[ ] Quality gates pass: cargo fmt --check, cargo check --all-targets, cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings, cargo test
[ ] Docs/fixtures updated if behavior or UX changes","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-03T02:18:50.598149638Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-04T19:28:33.293934169Z","closed_at":"2026-02-03T19:49:42.660939587Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"comments":[{"id":157,"issue_id":"bd-3tu","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Rust-crates-publishing checklist (use for pi_agent_rust + asupersync + rich_rust + charmed_rust):
1) Ensure Cargo.toml metadata: license, readme, repository, keywords/categories, publish=true.
2) Tag/version alignment: tag vX.Y.Z must match package.version.
3) CI: publish job gated on tags; requires CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN; skip prerelease tags.
4) Order: publish dependency crates first (asupersync/rich_rust/charmed_rust), then pi_agent_rust.
5) Validate with cargo package + cargo publish --dry-run.","created_at":"2026-02-03T17:02:29Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3u1y","title":"Gap: nicobailon-interview-tool missing embedded asset (form/index.html)","description":"# Problem
community/nicobailon-interview-tool fails because it references a form/index.html file that is not present in the extension directory. This is an artifact completeness issue.

# Root cause
The extension expects an embedded HTML file (form/index.html) to be bundled alongside it. Either:
1. The file was not downloaded/extracted when the corpus was assembled
2. The extension has a build step that generates it

# Action
- Check the extension source repo for the file
- If it exists upstream, add it to the corpus
- If it requires a build step, document as a known limitation

# Evidence
- `tests/ext_conformance/reports/random_trials/RANDOM_TRIALS_REPORT.md`
- `target/ext_conformance/logs/random_trials/trial_seed_42.jsonl`","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"MistyCliff","created_at":"2026-02-06T21:51:39.162776792Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T01:44:13.481106386Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T01:44:13.481002302Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"comments":[{"id":636,"issue_id":"bd-3u1y","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Resetting to open — stalled with no progress from previous assignee. Available for pickup.","created_at":"2026-02-07T00:57:29Z"},{"id":648,"issue_id":"bd-3u1y","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"ScarletGate: Investigated. Extension server.ts (line 227-232) reads 3 embedded files at module load time via readFileSync:
- form/index.html
- form/styles.css  
- form/script.js
- form/themes/ directory

These are build-time or repo-included assets not captured in the corpus snapshot. The extension fundamentally can't load without them. Options:
1. Download from upstream repo (manual, fragile)
2. Accept as permanent N/A (embedded asset dependency)

Recommendation: Accept as N/A. This is an artifact completeness issue, not a resolver/shim gap. Closing as won't-fix.","created_at":"2026-02-07T01:44:06Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3u81","title":"Preflight: include CARGO_TARGET_DIR and CARGO_HOME in disk checks","description":"scripts/e2e/run_all.sh preflight currently checks repo/artifacts/TMPDIR headroom but does not explicitly probe CARGO_TARGET_DIR and CARGO_HOME paths. This can miss ENOSPC risk when cargo caches/target are redirected to different mounts. Extend check_disk_headroom to probe CARGO_TARGET_DIR (or PROJECT_ROOT/target fallback) and CARGO_HOME (or HOME/.cargo fallback), using tmp/cargo threshold budget and clear target labels in output.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-02-08T07:57:13.093605306Z","created_by":"root","updated_at":"2026-02-08T08:00:16.895401565Z","closed_at":"2026-02-08T08:00:16.895378803Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["infra","quality","tests"],"comments":[{"id":830,"issue_id":"bd-3u81","author":"root","text":"Implemented in scripts/e2e/run_all.sh: preflight now probes CARGO_TARGET_DIR and CARGO_HOME (in addition to repo/artifacts/TMPDIR), applies tmp/cargo threshold (VERIFY_MIN_TMP_FREE_MB), and updates guidance docs/help text. Validation: bash -n scripts/e2e/run_all.sh; ./scripts/e2e/run_all.sh --profile quick --skip-lint --skip-unit exits 2 in low-space environment and now reports cargo_target/cargo_home targets explicitly.","created_at":"2026-02-08T08:00:10Z"}]}
